Bullet Point 5: NON-GMO, GLUTEN-FREE, VEGAN, BPA-FREE PLASTIC JAR, & CERTIFIED KOSHER.
Product Description: Crazy Richard's Creamy Peanut Butter is made with a unique process. Crazy Richard's roasts and grinds only top-quality peanuts to create a creaminess that keeps its peanut butter easy to spread even after refrigeration (which is optional). Crazy Richard's is naturally nutritious and is made only from one single ingredient: peanuts. Do you feel this good about everything you eat? Compare ingredient lists! ...and you'll agree that after just one taste, Crazy Richard's is the only peanut butter "Worth the Stir!" For best results, stir before using. Refrigeration (optional) retards natural oil separation.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Fl Oz
overall_summary: Positioned as a premium-quality, single-ingredient peanut butter with a strong health and natural focus. The 16 oz BPA-free plastic jar emphasizes sustainability and safety, while claims like '100% natural,' 'non-GMO,' and 'high plant-based protein' target health-conscious consumers. Despite the absence of organic certification, the minimal ingredient list and absence of artificial additives suggest a mid-to-high-tier value proposition in the natural peanut butter segment.
